title: Kandal M Venture appoints new CEO
content:
* Kandal M Venture (FMFC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FMFC]) appointed [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20386782-kandal-m-venture-limited-announces-appointment-of-new-chief-executive-officer] Fok Yui Kwong as executive director and chief executive officer, effective February 1, 2026.
 	* Ngee Woon Lim will step down as CEO and executive director effective the same date.
